The '''sack of Ko Vari''' was a battle which saw the forces of [[Xim/Legends|Xim the Despot]] lay waste to the once pristine [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] colony of [[Boonta/Legends|Ko Vari]]. However, the Hutts would soon have revenge after they decimated Xim's fleet at the [[First Battle of Vontor]].

{{Battle-stub}}
